title: Flaky Festive Korean Steak Stir-fry
description: A festive and vegetarian-friendly stir-fry featuring fillet of steak, flavored with fermented vegetables for a unique kick.
instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat the bottom.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Place fillet of steak in the pan, sear on both sides for about 2-3 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Remove from heat, sprinkle red pepper flakes and sugar over the top. Let it sit for a few seconds to allow flavors to meld together.
Add chopped fermented cabbage (kimchi) and bean sprouts into the pan, mix well with the steak mixture.
Drizzle with soy sauce and fish sauce (if using), stir until everything is evenly coated in sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot with optional sesame seeds for garnish.
Enjoy your Flaky Festive Korean Steak Stir-fry as a nutritious meal.
